title: 17 Proven Currency Trading Strategies - How to Profit in the Forex Market 2013
note: SRC-001: The entry price is deﬁ ned as the price at which a trade is triggered. The proﬁ t target is deﬁ ned as the price where the trade exits with a proﬁ t. The stop loss is deﬁ ned as the price where the trade exits with a loss.
